message:
🌱 Add metal3-io: Stop requiring DEPLOY_KERNEL/DEPLOY_RAMDISK mission (#1334)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "metal3-io-2100-stop-requiring-deploy-kernel-deploy-ramdisk",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "metal3-io: Stop requiring DEPLOY_KERNEL/DEPLOY_RAMDISK",
+    "description": "Stop requiring DEPLOY_KERNEL/DEPLOY_RAMDISK. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current metal3-io deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your metal3-io version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n metal3-io -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metal3-io\nhelm list -n metal3-io 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working metal3-io installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review metal3-io configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant metal3-io configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n metal3-io -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metal3-io\nkubectl get configmap -n metal3-io -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=metal3-io\n```\nWith https://github.com/metal3-io/ironic-image/pull/452 in place for some time, Ironic has reasonable defaults for these values when paired with the default IPA-downloader. Not requiring them makes BMO installation simpler."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Stop requiring DEPLOY_KERNEL/DEPLOY_RAMDISK",
+        "description": "This PR allows one to work with BareMetalHosts of different architectures while using kernel+ramdisk for preprovisioning.\n\nIt does this by adding new environment variables to configure the different URLs per target CPU architecture:\n - `DEPLOY_KERNEL_URL_<ARCH>`\n - `DEPLOY_RAMDISK_URL_<ARCH>`\n - `DEPLOY_ISO_URL_<ARCH>`\n - `DEPLOY_BOOTLOADER_URL_<ARCH>`\n\nNon suffixed variables are used as defaults, if there is no architecture specific image(s) defined for the BMH CPU architecture.\n\nIt also adds\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n metal3-io -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metal3-io\nkubectl get events -n metal3-io --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Stop requiring DEPLOY_KERNEL/DEPLOY_RAMDISK\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This PR allows one to work with BareMetalHosts of different architectures while using kernel+ramdisk for preprovisioning.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },

+      "metal3-io",
+      "incubating",
